nodes.text: Oh, you scanned my ID? Is there a problem?

responses.text: Just verifying your details. Can you confirm your date of birth?
I need to check something about your prescription.
No problem at all, just routine procedure.

nodes.text: Sure, no problem. It should all be on the card there.

responses.text: Hmm, there seems to be a discrepancy...

nodes.text: Of course. What do you need to know?

responses.text: Is this medication for you or someone else?
Are you currently taking any other medications?

nodes.text: Ah okay, that makes sense. Take your time!
It's for me, yes. My doctor prescribed it last week.

responses.text: Perfect, that all checks out. Thank you.

nodes.text: No, nothing else at the moment. Just this one.

responses.text: Good to know. Everything looks fine then.
Alright, just make sure to read the instructions on the label.

nodes.text: Really? That's strange... Let me double check. No, I'm pretty sure it's all correct.

responses.text: You're right, my mistake. Everything's fine.

nodes.text: Great, thanks for checking! I appreciate the thoroughness.
Will do, thanks for the reminder!
